title: pyrus teijiashanensis
intro: Pyrus teijiashanensis, also known as the Chinese wild pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of Pyrus teijiashanensis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Pyrus teijiashanensis are often made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
